_comment: Curated foreUP capability rows — validated via scripts/validate_foreup_courses.py. Matching (capability_store.match_capability) is exact-normalized-name (or alias) equality plus <=1.0 mi proximity, or an exact course_id. Fail-loud on malformed JSON: a broken edit must fail CI, not silently drop the real-data path. See specs/teetime-s1-foreup-plan.md.
